examples: Some food prices have leapt fivefold.
The number of very hot days is forecast to increase fivefold by 2100.
The biggest 250 have increased their headcount fivefold in 30 years.
The market voted its approval by marking up Panenergy's stock fivefold over five years.
As a result, America's prison population, like New York's, rose fivefold from 1980 to 2009.
